args.content:
# download expiry
# Tokens expire after 24 hours exactly. Use inclusive boundary so a token
# at exactly 24h is still considered valid; only ages strictly greater expire.
TOKEN_TTL_HOURS = 24


def is_expired(age_hours):
    """Return True if a token of the given age (in hours) is expired."""
    return age_hours > TOKEN_TTL_HOURS


def handle(value):
    return value
